message:
🌱 Add ko: RFC: Switch default base image to ghcr.io/distroless/static mission (#805)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "ko-722-rfc-switch-default-base-image-to-ghcr-io-distroless-static",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "ko: RFC: Switch default base image to ghcr.io/distroless/static",
+    "description": "RFC: Switch default base image to ghcr.io/distroless/static. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check ko installation",
+        "description": "Verify your ko installation:\n```bash\nko version\n```\nInstall if needed: `go install github.com/google/ko@latest` or `brew install ko`. ko builds Go container images without Docker."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review the issue context",
+        "description": "The current default base image is `gcr.io/distroless/static:nonroot`, which we switched two about 2 years ago in https://github.com/google/ko/issues/160 (from the non-`nonroot` variant)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for RFC: Switch default base image to ghcr.io/distroless/static",
+        "description": "Tested:\n\n- if `.ko.yaml` is empty or non-existent --> warning\n- if `.ko.yaml` specifies any `defaultBaseImage` --> no warning\n- if `.ko.yaml` specifies `baseImageOverrides` matching all requested builds --> no warning\n\nProgress toward #722 \n\n---\n\n```\n\u279c  ko git:(default-base-image-warning) go run ./\n```yaml\n$ crane manifest gcr.io/distroless/static:nonroot --platform=linux/amd64 | jq '.config.size + ([.layers[].size] | add)' | numfmt --to=iec\n786K\n\n$ crane manifest ghcr.io/distroless/static --platform=linux/amd64 | jq '.config.size + ([.layers[].size] | add)' | numfmt --to=iec\n129K\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the fix",
+        "description": "Test that the fix is working as expected:\n```bash\nko version\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"RFC: Switch default base image to ghcr.io/distroless/static\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Tested:\n\n- if `.ko.yaml` is empty or non-existent --> warning\n- if `.ko.yaml` specifies any `defaultBaseImage` --> no warning\n- if `.ko.yaml` specifies `baseImageOverrides` matching all requested builds --> no warning\n\nProgress toward #722 \n\n---\n\n```\n\u279c  ko git:(default-base-image-warning) go run ./ build ./ \n2022/06/21 13:20:30 Using base",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "$ crane manifest gcr.io/distroless/static:nonroot --platform=linux/amd64 | jq '.config.size + ([.layers[].size] | add)' | numfmt --to=iec\n786K\n\n$ crane manifest ghcr.io/distroless/static --platform=linux/amd64 | jq '.config.size + ([.layers[].size] | add)' | numfmt --to=iec\n129K",
+        "panic: time: missing Location in call to Time.In\n\ngoroutine 1 [running]:\ntime.Time.In(...)\n\ttime/time.go:1105\nmain.main()\n\tgithub.com/imjasonh/blahblah/tz/main.go:15 +0x4ee",
+        "UTC Time: 2022-06-09 15:04:01.807718177 +0000 UTC\nBerlin Time: 2022-06-09 17:04:01.807718177 +0200 CEST\nNew York Time: 2022-06-09 11:04:01.807718177 -0400 EDT\nDubai Time: 2022-06-09 19:04:01.807718177 +0400 +04"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "ko",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+      "ko"
+    ],

+      "feature"
+    ],

+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/ko-build/ko/issues/722",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/ko-build/ko",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/ko-build/ko/pull/733"
+    },
+    "reactions": 2,
+    "comments": 17,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "ko",
+      "go"
+    ],
+    "description": "Go 1.21+ and ko installed. ko is a CLI tool for building Go container images, not a Kubernetes workload."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:36:11.007Z",
